card.situation: Reach is not the issue (Emily's ~$2K paid drove 1,200 ranches last month — top in SEA), but conversion is blocked at the product layer. PH freelancer audience is overwhelmingly third-party fund collection (work outside Upwork/Fiverr), and WF freelancer product only supports Upwork/Fiverr. Upwork/Fiverr themselves have 20% commission and accumulation-then-bulk-withdraw behavior, so even where WF technically fits, friction is high. Joshua holding spend until Risk opens up third-party fund collection for freelancers. Vietnam freelancer launch may pressure-test the same product limits — worth monitoring.
asks: Track Risk team's progress on third-party fund collection for freelancers
Cross-share Vietnam freelancer launch findings (Thao) with Joshua so PH can ride momentum once unblocked
When product opens up: hire SEA freelancers as paid UGC reviewers ($10K test) — concept Steven floated, authentic LLM-feeding reviews
next: Wait on Risk product change before reactivating PH KOL spend
Continue Singapore investment; PH is paused not closed
benchmarks: LZero (registration) is the actual choke point, not awareness

extended.blockerDescription: WF freelancer product only supports Upwork/Fiverr collections. PH freelancer market is overwhelmingly third-party (private clients, direct contracts). Opening 3rd-party fund collection is the unlock.
extended.creatorEcosystem: Big on Facebook + TikTok; Facebook Messenger is their WhatsApp
extended.unblockedConcept: Hire SEA freelancers as paid UGC reviewers, $10K test, generates authentic LLM-feeding reviews
